name: gqa_paged_decode_h24_kv8_d128_ps64
description: Batched Grouped Query Attention decode with a paged KV cache (page_size=64). GQA ratio 3:1, head_dim=128.

num_kv_indices.description: Total number of KV page indices.

kv_indptr.description: KV page offsets for each sequence.

kv_indices.description: Page IDs for KV cache lookups.

reference:
import torch
import math


@torch.no_grad()
def run(q, k_cache, v_cache, kv_indptr, kv_indices, sm_scale):
    batch_size, num_qo_heads, head_dim = q.shape
    _, page_size, num_kv_heads, _ = k_cache.shape

    # Check constants
    assert num_qo_heads == 24
    assert num_kv_heads == 8
    assert head_dim == 128
    assert page_size == 64

    device = q.device

    output = torch.zeros(
        (batch_size, num_qo_heads, head_dim), dtype=torch.bfloat16, device=device
    )
    lse = torch.full(
        (batch_size, num_qo_heads), -float("inf"), dtype=torch.float32, device=device
    )

    gqa_ratio = num_qo_heads // num_kv_heads
    k_cache_f32 = k_cache.to(torch.float32)
    v_cache_f32 = v_cache.to(torch.float32)

    for b in range(batch_size):
        page_start = int(kv_indptr[b].item())
        page_end = int(kv_indptr[b + 1].item())

        if page_start >= page_end:
            output[b].zero_()
            continue

        page_ids = kv_indices[page_start:page_end].to(torch.long)
        # Gather all tokens from all pages (treating all as fully valid)
        k_batch = k_cache_f32[page_ids].reshape(-1, num_kv_heads, head_dim)
        v_batch = v_cache_f32[page_ids].reshape(-1, num_kv_heads, head_dim)
        q_batch = q[b].to(torch.float32)

        for h in range(num_qo_heads):
            kv_head = h // gqa_ratio
            q_head = q_batch[h]
            k_head = k_batch[:, kv_head]
            v_head = v_batch[:, kv_head]

            logits = torch.matmul(q_head, k_head.T) * sm_scale
            lse[b, h] = torch.logsumexp(logits, dim=-1) / math.log(2.0)
            attn = torch.softmax(logits, dim=-1)
            output[b, h] = torch.matmul(attn, v_head).to(torch.bfloat16)

    return output, lse
